name: Testo's Restaurant
description: Long-established Italian-American restaurant in downtown Troy serving traditional veal parmigiana as a core menu item. Multiple local reviews note the dish's generous portion and classic preparation with house red sauce and melted cheese.

evidence.detail: Repeated mentions of veal parmigiana as a standout entree
Consistent diner references to the veal parm

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Testo's Troy NY veal parmigiana plated dish
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Veal cutlet topped with red sauce and melted mozzarella on a white plate

name: Red Front Restaurant
description: Historic Troy eatery known for classic Italian entrees. Local coverage and reviews confirm veal parmigiana is regularly offered with traditional preparation.

evidence.detail: Coverage of classic Italian dishes including veal parm
Mention of veal parm among signature entrees

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Red Front Troy veal parmigiana entree
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Breaded veal with sauce and cheese served with pasta

name: Carmen's Restaurant
description: Rensselaer neighborhood staple serving traditional Italian-American veal parmigiana in large portions. Frequently cited in regional food discussions for consistent quality.

evidence.detail: Praised for traditional veal parm portions

photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Large portion of veal parm with side pasta on a dinner plate

name: Dino's Pizza
description: Popular Troy pizzeria offering veal parmigiana among its Italian entrees. Numerous Google reviews specifically reference the dish's flavor and portion size.

evidence.detail: Multiple customer comments on veal parm

photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Veal parm served with spaghetti on a standard restaurant plate

name: Panza's Restaurant
description: Downtown Troy Italian restaurant noted in local dining guides for veal specialties. Customer mentions consistently highlight the veal parmigiana preparation.

photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Plated veal cutlet with marinara and cheese
